scripts.build: pnpm --filter research-trellis-core build && pnpm --filter research-trellis build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter research-trellis-core test && pnpm run test:cli
scripts.test:cli: pnpm --filter research-trellis-core build && pnpm --filter research-trellis test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter research-trellis-core lint && pnpm --filter research-trellis lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter research-trellis-core build && pnpm --filter research-trellis typecheck
